sources.source_name: Example Public Archive Or News Source
sources.short_excerpt: Short human-entered excerpt only. Do not paste full posts, full articles, or large verbatim text.
sources.topic_hint: Neutral topic hint for editorial planning
sources.why_it_matters: Why this public information may matter to a neutral daily brief audience.
sources.operator_note: Human operator note about source review, terms status, and any caveats.

operator_checklist: Do not paste large original text blocks.
Do not fabricate source_url or archive_url.
Do not treat sample/fake data as real input.
Every real source must enter SourceReviewItem before evidence or brief generation.
Keep manual publish only; this file must not trigger platform publishing.
